title: Steamin' and Dreamin': The Grandmaster Cash Story
original_title: Steamin' + Dreamin': The Grandmaster Cash Story
overview: The controversial and moving tale of a struggling young Cork musician. We are introduced to the world of Cork hip-hop, its bitter rivalries, and the people behind the profanity.
